user.title: Connect to Tuxedo Touch
user.description: Enter the panel's web login credentials (not your 4-digit keypad user code, unless your installer set them to match). The code below is the keypad user code used to arm/disarm.

data.use_https: Use HTTPS (required if 'Secured Web Server Access' is enabled on the unit)
data.code: Keypad user code (optional, used as default arm/disarm code)

error.cannot_connect: Failed to connect - check the IP/port and that the unit is reachable
